# Covers all TypeFlag values, all string fields, and all modifier keywords.

# Damage spell
Name		Fireball
Flag		Damage
Level		5
SP              10
Value		20
Energy		50
DamageStr	%SS launches a fireball at %SD!

# Modify spell with WisdomCanReduce and StatusStr
Name		Curse
Flag		Modify
Agility		-3
Level		8
SP              15
NoTarget
ModifyStr	%SS curses %SD!
WearoffStr	The curse on %SD fades away.
StatusStr	Cursed
WisdomCanReduce

# Friendly Modify spell with MultiAffect and StrengthCanReduce
Name		War Blessing
Flag		Modify
Strength	+3
Dexterity	+1
Friendly
Level		3
SP              8
MultiAffect
ModifyStr	%SS blesses %SD with power!
WearoffStr	The blessing on %SD has faded.
StrengthCanReduce

# Incapacitate spell
Name		Stun
Flag		Incapacitate
Level		6
SP              12
OtherStr	%SS stuns %SD!

# RaiseUndead spell
Name		Raise Dead
Flag		RaiseUndead
Level		10
SP              20
UndeadName	Skeleton Warrior
OtherStr	%SS raises a fallen warrior!

# BanishUndead spell
Name		Banish Evil
Flag		BanishUndead
Level		7
SP              12
Energy		30

# Charisma-affecting spell covering Charisma attribute case
Name		Demoralise
Flag		Modify
Charisma	-2
Wisdom		-1
Level		4
SP              7
ModifyStr	%SS demoralises %SD!
WearoffStr	%SD recovers their composure.
